backend/main.mo: Defines types for racing, user profiles, groups, teams, subscriptions, store items, and gameplay structures used across the backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: Lists implemented features with linked files, components, test IDs, and confidence metadata for project verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Provides human‑written summaries of major frontend files including routing, UI components, game systems, and new store-related features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme variables defining light and dark mode color tokens and global styling rules.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point that mounts the React app and loads the main TypeScript bundle.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application wiring authentication, profile setup, layout, and routes including /store, /chat, and payment pages.
frontend/src/components/AIRace.tsx: Thin wrapper component that renders AIRaceTrack with an exit handler.
frontend/src/components/AIRaceSimple.tsx: Empty placeholder component with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/AIRaceTrack.tsx: AI racing scene using react-three-fiber with car rendering, weather, audio, SR progression, and race lifecycle hooks.
frontend/src/components/F1RaceTrack.tsx: 3D F1 racing scene using react-three-fiber, rendering cars, track, weather, audio, and syncing player positions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer showing ©2025 and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/FriendsManager.t: UI to add, list, and remove friends via principal IDs using query hooks.
frontend/src/components/Groups.tsx: Interface to view, create, and join racing groups with dialogs and validation.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Top navigation bar with login/logout, theme toggle, and app title.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboards.tsx: Season leaderboard UI showing global and friends rankings with loading states.
frontend/src/components/Matchmaking.tsx: Simulated matchmaking flow showing search progress, matched players, and launching the F1 race scene.
frontend/src/components/PlayerProfile.ts: Displays the player's profile, race stats, and friends with loading states and a formatted stats grid.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal for creating a new racer profile with a name input and save action.
frontend/src/components/race/RaceXPHUD.t: HUD showing current XP and recent XP gains with animated badges.
frontend/src/components/race/stuntDetect: Implements stunt detection logic based on airtime, height, speed, and cooldown tracking.
frontend/src/components/race/XPCoinTypes: Defines XP coin metadata and helpers for retrieving coin images and colors.
frontend/src/components/store/storeCatal: Provides a catalog of neon light store items with cost, description, and image data.
frontend/src/components/store/StoreItemC: Renders a store item card with purchase states, cost display, and owned indicators.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to user identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEngineAudio.ts: Custom hook generating engine-like audio with controls for start, stop, volume, and speed-based pitch.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling identity loading, login, and state flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks wrapping backend actor methods for profiles, stats, leaderboards, friends, and other game data.
frontend/src/hooks/useRaceAudio.ts: Implements a custom hook to control audio playback, volume, mute state, and looping for race sounds.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base styles and custom theme variables, including neon and dark mode color utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx: Renders a chat UI allowing users to select friends, view conversations, and send direct messages.
frontend/src/pages/MainMenu.tsx: Implements the main navigation menu with tabbed access to multiplayer, groups, team, leaderboards, profile, and plans sections.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Displays a payment cancellation message with help info and buttons to retry or return home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Shows a payment success confirmation, unlock details, and auto-redirects home with a countdown.
frontend/src/pages/Plans.tsx: Renders subscription plans, checks current plan, and triggers Stripe checkout for premium upgrades.
frontend/src/pages/Store.tsx: Displays the in‑game store with XP balance, earn‑XP tips, and purchase handling for neon items.
frontend/src/pages/Team.tsx: Manages team membership, roles, and roster display with dialogs for joining, changing roles, or leaving.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning hash parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom OKLCH-based theme colors, container settings, extended animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animation.
project_state.json: Defines project state for adding an in‑game XP-based Store, listing features, requirements, and image assets for neon light items and XP coins.
